description_long: This food truck is a compact, boxy trailer with a predominantly white exterior and a flat roof. It features a large side window with a turquoise accent, likely serving as the main service window for customer interaction. The rear of the truck has a yellow door with a bone-shaped cutout, suggesting a pet-related business, and the text 'BANHO E TOSA A DOMICILIO' is visible on the lower rear panel. The side panel displays the word 'DOCELAR' along with an image of a person and additional text, reinforcing the branding. The truck is mounted on a single axle with two wheels and has a black tow hitch at the front for mobility. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practical service features.
description: A compact, white food truck trailer with a turquoise service window, yellow rear door, and clear branding. It features a simple, functional design with pet-related signage and a single axle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large turquoise service window and single wheel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the yellow door with a bone cutout and rear signage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'DOCELAR' branding and additional graphics.
description_view_3: Front view showing the tow hitch and the plain, unadorned front panel.
attribute_signage: Text 'DOCELAR', 'BANHO E TOSA A DOMICILIO', image of a person, bone-shaped cutout on door
